forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 95. Heat index values as high as 103. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before midnight, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 76. Heat index values as high as 99. Southwest wind 9 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

weather_report:
Boston basks under a sun that lays a warm embrace across the city, marking the day with a brightness that feels both inviting and intense. The air carries with it the promise of afternoon storms, flirtatiously teasing the sky with an occasional rumble of thunder or a dash of rain. Yet, even with those hints of summer’s tempest, this afternoon presents a tapestry of partly sunny skies and a high that dances near 95, warmed further by a heat index that escalates the sensation of sultriness to a steamy 103. A light southwest breeze, a friendly whisper in the heat, mingles with the aromas of fresh summer adventures waiting to unfold.

As twilight closes in, those stormy flirtations may transform into a more serious encounter, with the potential for evening showers lingering in the air like a heavy sigh. The city will cool to a restful 76, though it won’t lose its warmth, as heat indices linger with a comforting weight. For today's attire, lightweight and breathable fabrics will serve you well—think cottons and linens that dance with the occasional gust. Don your favorite hat for shade, and consider an umbrella or a light jacket for the evening, just in case the thunder decides to make good on its promises. Perhaps a stroll through the long shadows of the Back Bay, a late afternoon visit to the waterfront, or a simple gathering with friends at an outdoor café will be the best responses to such a spirited day—each providing a chance to savor the flavors of summer as they unfold.
